'''bozhahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:raccoonproof|raccoonproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raccoonproof|raccoonproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bozhahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhahithi|bozhahithi]] || [[word:bozhahiji|bozhahiji]] || [[word:bozhahishi|bozhahishi]] || [[word:bozhahiki|bozhahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhahuthuthu|bozhahuthuthu]] || [[word:bozhahujuju|bozhahujuju]] || [[word:bozhahushushu|bozhahushushu]] || [[word:bozhahukuku|bozhahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhahuthu|bozhahuthu]] || [[word:bozhahuju|bozhahuju]] || [[word:bozhahushu|bozhahushu]] || [[word:bozhahuku|bozhahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhahufthuf|bozhahufthuf]] || [[word:bozhahufjuf|bozhahufjuf]] || [[word:bozhahufshuf|bozhahufshuf]] || [[word:bozhahufkuf|bozhahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhahethe|bozhahethe]] || [[word:bozhaheje|bozhaheje]] || [[word:bozhaheshe|bozhaheshe]] || [[word:bozhaheke|bozhaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhahothotho|bozhahothotho]] || [[word:bozhahojojo|bozhahojojo]] || [[word:bozhahoshosho|bozhahoshosho]] || [[word:bozhahokoko|bozhahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhahotho|bozhahotho]] || [[word:bozhahojo|bozhahojo]] || [[word:bozhahosho|bozhahosho]] || [[word:bozhahoko|bozhahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhahofthof|bozhahofthof]] || [[word:bozhahofjof|bozhahofjof]] || [[word:bozhahofshof|bozhahofshof]] || [[word:bozhahofkof|bozhahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhahïfthïf|bozhahïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfjïf|bozhahïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfshïf|bozhahïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfkïf|bozhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhahïfthïfthïf|bozhahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfjïfjïf|bozhahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfshïfshïf|bozhahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfkïfkïf|bozhahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhahïfthïf|bozhahïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfjïf|bozhahïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfshïf|bozhahïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfkïf|bozhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhahïfthïf|bozhahïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfjïf|bozhahïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfshïf|bozhahïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhahïfkïf|bozhahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhahæthæ|bozhahæthæ]] || [[word:bozhahæjæ|bozhahæjæ]] || [[word:bozhahæshæ|bozhahæshæ]] || [[word:bozhahækæ|bozhahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhahathatha|bozhahathatha]] || [[word:bozhahajaja|bozhahajaja]] || [[word:bozhahashasha|bozhahashasha]] || [[word:bozhahakaka|bozhahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhahatha|bozhahatha]] || [[word:bozhahaja|bozhahaja]] || [[word:bozhahasha|bozhahasha]] || [[word:bozhahaka|bozhahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhahafthaf|bozhahafthaf]] || [[word:bozhahafjaf|bozhahafjaf]] || [[word:bozhahafshaf|bozhahafshaf]] || [[word:bozhahafkaf|bozhahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bozhahasha|bozhahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhahshësha|bozhahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhahrosha|bozhahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhahmusha|bozhahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhahyasha|bozhahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhahnkshësha|gobozhahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhahnkrosha|gobozhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhahnkmusha|gobozhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhahnkyasha|gobozhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bozhazhahasha|bozhazhahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhazhahshësha|bozhazhahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhazhahrosha|bozhazhahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhazhahmusha|bozhazhahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhazhahyasha|bozhazhahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhazhahnkshësha|gobozhazhahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhazhahnkrosha|gobozhazhahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhazhahnkmusha|gobozhazhahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhazhahnkyasha|gobozhazhahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bezhæhasha|bezhæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bezhæhshësha|bezhæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bezhæhrosha|bezhæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bezhæhmusha|bezhæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bezhæhyasha|bezhæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobezhæhnkshësha|gobezhæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobezhæhnkrosha|gobezhæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobezhæhnkmusha|gobezhæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobezhæhnkyasha|gobezhæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bozhfahasha|bozhfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhfahshësha|bozhfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhfahrosha|bozhfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhfahmusha|bozhfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhfahyasha|bozhfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhfahnkshësha|gobozhfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhfahnkrosha|gobozhfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhfahnkmusha|gobozhfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhfahnkyasha|gobozhfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
